title: Depression Risk Predictor
description: PyTorch neural network for student mental health prediction. F1: 87.15%, AUC: 92.2%.
longDescription:
A comprehensive ML system that predicts student depression risk using behavioral data from 28,000+ records.

• PyTorch neural network validated against XGBoost, Random Forest, Stacking Ensemble
• SHAP-based model explainability
• 5-fold cross-validation
• Gender and age fairness analysis
• FastAPI REST API for real-time predictions
• 189 passing tests

title: InferaMind AI
description: ML tutoring system with RAG pipelines, FAISS search, and real-time streaming via Ollama.
longDescription:
A scalable ML tutoring system using Retrieval-Augmented Generation.

• LangGraph-orchestrated RAG pipeline
• Embeddings-based query classification
• FAISS vector search for fast retrieval
• Real-time Server-Sent Events streaming
• RAGAS evaluation pipeline
• Docker-ready with GPU support
• 40+ tests with CI/CD

title: MeetSync
description: Video conferencing with P2P/SFU architecture, encrypted chat, and waiting rooms. 247 tests.
longDescription:
MeetSync is a production-grade video conferencing platform. It supports dual P2P and SFU architecture — P2P for small calls, mediasoup-based SFU for larger rooms with simulcast encoding across 3 spatial layers.

• AES-256-GCM encrypted real-time chat
• Waiting room with host-controlled promotion
• Auto-restart SFU workers for fault tolerance
• Redis write-through caching with Socket.IO adapter
• Automatic reconnection recovery on network drops
• 247 unit tests + 6 Playwright end-to-end tests

title: GitForge
description: Code hosting platform with custom VCS, CI/CD pipelines, and Kanban boards. 129 tests.
longDescription:
A full-featured code hosting and collaboration platform built from scratch.

• Custom file-based version control system
• Real CI/CD pipeline execution
• Static code review with Myers diff algorithm
• Kanban boards for project management
• Hybrid GraphQL + REST API
• Redis caching, JWT + API key authentication
• Audit logging and webhook integrations

title: PCB Defect Detection
description: Computer vision system using ResNet-50 for automated PCB defect classification.
longDescription:
End-to-end AI system for detecting PCB defects using deep learning and classical computer vision.

• PyTorch ResNet-50 for defect classification
• SSIM-based anomaly detection
• Perceptual hashing for template matching
• Non-Maximum Suppression for localization
• Streamlit UI for interactive analysis
• FastAPI backend for API access
• Dockerized deployment with CI/CD
